title: Oh no: Create Utilities
description: Oh no: Create Utilities makes automation a lot easier and also adds some useful QoL features.
body:
Oh no: Create Utilities
is a mod that adds a bunch of useful yet important QoL features to the game, mostly about automations.
 

Features:
Misc:
Fluid: Glow Ink: Useful in some automation recipes, mainly as a compat for Create: Enchantment Industry v1.x to simplify Hyper Experience farming. A luminous, arcane liquid that flows with soft shimmer. When placed, it emits gentle glowing particles—those who touch it begin to shine, until washed clean by water.

Item: Volcanic Ash: Used to make tuff. A fine, scorched dust born from violent eruptions—still warm to the touch and rich in volcanic minerals. Can be made by crushing Basalt or fusing Blaze Powder with Ash. Compact it with some rocks to create tough, volcanic stone, the tuff, useful for getting a lot of shinies when crushed or for building.

Block: Compressed Cobblestone: Compressed/Compacted variant of the cobblestone. A dense block pressed from nine cobblestones—saves space in your chests and breaks back down on demand.

Create's Diving boots: now remove levitation effect when worn. Diving Boots keep you grounded—no more floating away!

❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
🔧 Oh no: Create Utilities (Mod)
Q: What does this mod do?
A: "Oh no: Create Utilities" is an addon for the Create mod that adds a bunch of new Create mod related recipes designed to make automation smoother and more intuitive. It also adds some useful QoL features.

Q: Does this mod require the Create mod?
A: Yes, the Create mod is a hard dependency. Most version should work alongside this addon.

, because it is only about recipes (for now...).

Q: Can I use this in my own modpack?
A: Absolutely! Just credit this mod properly and link back to the CurseForge page.

Q: Is this compatible with other Create addons?
A: Most Create addons should work fine. If you run into conflicts, feel free to report them on the Issues tab.

Q: I found a bug or have a suggestion! Where should I go?
A: You can use the CurseForge "Issues" section or leave a comment. Feedback is always appreciated!

Q: The features description is horrible!
A: Sorry for the inconvenience, I don't have much time to do fancying and a good mod description will be written after this mod is completely stable.
